formula_note: Only a one-sided combatant death estimate is publishable from the located evidence: 18 U.S. direct deaths.
uncertainty_note: This does not capture all coalition or UN battle deaths and therefore cannot support a symmetric opposed-combatant denominator.
quality_note: Reliable as a partial core metric only.

formula_note: Somali deaths are kept in an unknown-status pool because the located sources do not separate civilians from fighters.
uncertainty_note: This is a mixed-status, mixed-victim pool and must not be merged into civilian or combatant baseline numerators.
quality_note: Useful context, not a clean core DR input.
